---
title: "About"
title-block: false
---

::: {.page-intro}
::: {.profile-stack}
![](assets/profile-photo.jpg){.profile-photo}

::: {.profile-caption}
These are belay glasses, they use prisms.
:::
:::

::: {.page-intro-copy}
I am a PhD student in physics at Virginia Tech focused on quantum foundations and quantum error correction.

:::
:::
